correct_answer: 17 years old (she was executed in January 1944, born in 1926)

question: What paradoxical property makes skatole (3-methylindole) useful in the perfume industry despite being a major component of the smell of feces?

correct_answer: A detailed description of the Malabar and Coromandel coasts of India, as well as the island of Ceylon (Sri Lanka), including their religions, customs, and natural history
